name: Phase 1: Pre-run environment validation
description: Manual hook — run this before starting main.py or app_ui.py to validate the environment is correctly configured.

action.message:
You've triggered the Phase 1 pre-run validation. Please check the following before running main.py or app_ui.py:

1. Does phase-1-agentic-navigation-planner/.env exist? (not just .env.example)
2. Is DEEPRACER_IP set to the correct IP address of your DeepRacer on the local network?
3. Is DEEPRACER_PASSWORD set to the DeepRacer web console password?
4. Is AWS_REGION set to a region where Amazon Bedrock Nova Lite is available (e.g. us-east-1)?
5. Are AWS credentials configured in the environment (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID / AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY or an IAM role)?
6. Is the DeepRacer car powered on and reachable at the configured IP?
7. Are all dependencies installed? Run: pip install -r phase-1-agentic-navigation-planner/requirements.txt

If all checks pass, run:
  Terminal REPL: python phase-1-agentic-navigation-planner/main.py
  Web UI:        python phase-1-agentic-navigation-planner/app_ui.py

Please check the .env file now and report any missing or suspicious values (without revealing the password).
